reach_why: Extends known critiques of path dependence and model collapse, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links reinforcement-by-reuse, synthetic Einstein priors, and recursive LLM criticism into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing search trajectories, novelty outcomes, and critic judgments under recycled versus non-recycled abstraction pools.
explanation: Recursive synthetic priors can make systems reward familiar patterns over genuinely novel explanations.
